description.ko: 액체 유리의 풀을 가로지르는 빠른 분산광이 순수한 밝음을 무지개 에너지로 바꿉니다.
description.en: Fast arcs of dispersed light ripple through a liquid-glass pool, turning pure brightness into rainbow energy.

prompt: A bright overhead view of a shallow circular pool of perfectly clear liquid glass, its surface tension pulled into four rotating lens-shaped waves around a small radiant core. Thin sheets of white light skim across the rippling surface and bend instantly into fast, razor-clean arcs of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Rainbow caustics ripple across the white porcelain floor like shifting interference maps, with strong chromatic aberration along every curved wave crest, crisp transparent highlights, only a few sparkling droplets suspended above the pool, luminous pure-energy atmosphere, high optical precision, kinetic refraction, brilliant and futuristic.
